synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23299 Oracle Linux 10 libvirt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23299
description:
[11.5.0-4.2.0.1]
- Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from changelog [Orabug: 32019554]

[11.5.0-4.2.el10_1]
- cpu_conf: Make virCPUDefFilterFeatures return void (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_domain: Simplify qemuDomainFixupCPUs (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_domain: Fix qemuDomainFixupCPUs (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_process: Always fix CPUs on reconnect (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_monitor: Filter CPU features reported by QEMU (RHEL-126094)
- qemu: Ignore "ht" CPU feature (RHEL-126094)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23299

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23299.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libvirt-11.5.0-4.2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
libvirt-client-11.5.0-4.2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

Description of changes:

[11.5.0-4.2.0.1]
- Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from changelog [Orabug: 32019554]

[11.5.0-4.2.el10_1]
- cpu_conf: Make virCPUDefFilterFeatures return void (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_domain: Simplify qemuDomainFixupCPUs (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_domain: Fix qemuDomainFixupCPUs (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_process: Always fix CPUs on reconnect (RHEL-126094)
- qemu_monitor: Filter CPU features reported by QEMU (RHEL-126094)
- qemu: Ignore "ht" CPU feature (RHEL-126094)
